question_text: Let A and B be two n × n matrices over real numbers. Let rank(M) and det(M) denote the rank and determinant of a matrix M, respectively. Consider the following statements: I.I.I.I.I. rank(AB) = rank(A) rank(B) II.

options.D: et(AB) = det(A) det(B) III. III. rank(A + B) ≤ rank(A) + rank(B) IV. det(A + B) ≤ det(A) + det(B) Which of the above statements are TRUE?
